LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT CALA FOODS INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE ALLEGATIONS IN PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. PUNITIVE DAMAGE ALLEGATIONS CAN STAND AS TO THE ALLEGED AGENT DESCRIBED AS A SECURITY GUARD EVEN IF PLAINTIFF ULTIMATELY COULD NOT RECOVER PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM THE CORPORATE DEFENDANT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CALA FOODS INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE ALLEGATIONS IN PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: Lori K. Sicard, Esq. of Law Office of Lori K. Sicard 217-9428 for pltf & opposing party; Norine M. Busser, Esq. of Brady, Vorwerck, Ryder & Caspino 925/274-9500 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. PUNITIVE DAMAGE ALLEGATIONS CAN STAND AS TO THE ALLEGED AGENT DESCRIBED AS A SECURITY GUARD EVEN IF PLAINTIFF ULTIMATELY COULD NOT RECOVER PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM THE CORPORATE DEFENDANT. Order signed in open court. (302/PJB/VC) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
